title: Clustered Alternate-Marking Method
abstract: This document generalizes and expands the Alternate-Marking methodology to measure any kind of unicast flow whose packets can follow several different paths in the network; this can result in a multipoint-to-multipoint network.  The network clustering approach is presented and, for this reason, the technique described here is called "Clustered Alternate Marking".  This document obsoletes RFC 8889.
